modeling_status.reason: WIP/unverified reference record. The image is a clean recursive circuit-maze drawing with visible submaze blocks, but no complete, audited pin netlist or replayable step sequence has been derived in this package.
modeling_status.next_step: Trace every visible wire component into a pin-to-pin netlist, confirm whether crossings connect only at same-color/marked junctions, then solve the resulting recursive Port Graph and add an fmaze-solution-v0 replay.

notes: Image source is astrolog.org fractal2.gif, referenced in local mathpuzzle discussion.
Local discussion says a hand solution was found with chip depth 7 and 66 chip-entry/exit steps, but does not provide a replayable path.
Visible drawing appears to use colored wires to disambiguate overlapping routes; this package has not verified every endpoint or crossing.
